title: Pacific Biosciences of California Q3 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Pacific Biosciences of California (PACB) held its Q3 2021 earnings conference call on November 2, 2021. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.24 and the consensus revenue estimate was $33.6 million with +76.1% year-over-year growth expected. The company achieved product and services revenue of $34.9 million in Q3 2021, an 83% increase compared to Q3 2020 and a 14% increase over Q2 2021. The company installed 44 Sequel II and IIe systems in Q3, an all-time quarterly high, bringing the total installed base to 326 units. The company exceeded its revenue expectations with the actual result of $34.9 million beating the consensus estimate of $33.6 million. The earnings call provided discussion on sequencing platform adoption, consumables revenue growth, and future business opportunities.
